query: Tell me about the companies behind my open support cases.
reasoning: The user is seeking information about the companies related to their open support cases, which involves commercial relationship data. Thus, I will use all available agents to get a complete picture including CRM data from Salesforce and other relevant details from Graph and Smartsales.

steps.task: Fetch all open support cases along with the associated company information.
Using the company names obtained from step 1, gather any relevant emails, calendar events, and internal documents related to these companies.
Using the company names obtained from step 1, retrieve the locations and catalog items associated with these companies.

synthesis: Combine the results from steps 1, 2, and 3 to provide a comprehensive overview of the companies behind the open support cases, including CRM details, communication history, and location information.
